parsed.production_notes: The presenter's facial movements and lip-sync are slightly stiff and unnatural. The background is perfectly static, and the lighting on the subject is unusually even, which are common traits of AI-generated video avatars.

characters.appearance: White male, late 20s, slim build, fair complexion. Short light brown hair, light stubble, round tortoiseshell glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Navy blue crew-neck sweater over a white collared shirt.

scenes.setting: A softly lit home office or living room with a bookshelf and framed art.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A looking directly at the camera with an earnest expression. He is dressed in a navy blue crew-neck sweater over a white collared shirt and wears round tortoiseshell glasses. The background is a softly lit room featuring a wooden bookshelf with books and a potted trailing plant on the left. A framed piece of art hangs on the wall to the right. The lighting is warm, even, and natural-looking.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous talking-head shot of Character A speaking directly to the camera. Dynamic, word-by-word captions appear in the lower center of the frame, highlighting the spoken words in yellow. Towards the end of the scene, a small, pill-shaped button with a double arrow icon and text appears at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: My English is good enough to get the job.
Character A says: But not good enough to get the promotion.
Character A says: I say things like we have a problem when natives say we are facing a challenge.
Character A says: Small things.
Character A says: But they make you sound like a student, not a leader.
Character A says: Fluently taught me how to rephrase.
Character A says: Like saying let me circle back instead of I will answer later.
Character A says: Ten minutes a day on my commute.
Character A says: And now people actually listen differently when I talk.
Character A says: Download Fluently and start sounding like a leader.
scenes.on_screen_text: My English is good enough to get the job. But not good enough to get the promotion. I say things like we have a problem when natives say we are facing a challenge. Small things. But they make you sound like a student, not a leader. Fluently taught me how to rephrase. Like saying let me circle back instead of I will answer later. Ten minutes a day on my commute. And now people actually listen differently when I talk. Download Fluently and start sounding like a leader. >> Start speaking

panels.panel_visual_description: A simple, abstract background consisting of a smooth, dark purple to black radial gradient. The center is slightly lighter purple, fading to black at the edges. There are no objects, characters, or distinct light sources visible.

scenes.visual_description: A static end-card graphic. The background is a dark purple gradient. In the center is a large, rounded square app icon featuring a blue gradient and two white right-pointing arrows. Below the icon is the app name and a short tagline. At the bottom is a purple, pill-shaped download button.
scenes.on_screen_text: >> Fluently App AI-power English coach DOWNLOAD NOW
